title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Britannia Industries - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Britannia Industries - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Britannia Industries has an exciting opening for a Process Engineer at our Vijayawada office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Britannia Industries:
Britannia Industries is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Work-from-home flexibility
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Vijayawada, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Britannia Industries!
